pr.title: 12L Group-INT4 MLP + INT6 Attn + BigramHash(10240) — val_bpb 1.1449 pre-quant

output.summary: Group INT4 nibble packing for per-64-column MLP weights with fp16 scales halves storage, freeing room for a 12-layer INT6-attention transformer plus BigramHash features.
techniques: Group INT4 nibble packing (2 values/byte) with per-group fp16 scales
12-layer transformer enabled by reduced MLP footprint
INT6 attention with BigramHash embeddings and SWA
